qa_pair.question: How many tools does the github-pull-requests MCP server expose? Answer with just the number.
What is the name of the tool that removes requested reviewers from a pull request?
What is the name of the tool that finds issues linked to a pull request?
In get_linked_issues's result, what source value labels a match found only through Timeline-API or text-parsing fallback, as opposed to the official GraphQL field?
In get_linked_issues's result, what source value labels a match found via the GraphQL closingIssuesReferences field?
What error code does request_review return when the target pull request has already closed or merged?
Which plugin does github-pull-requests declare a dependency on in its plugin.json?
What is the name of the tool that lists the currently requested reviewers and teams on a pull request, without a separate Timeline-API call?
